textByHash.1f03e37c7be5c46239f279d6fc8490ed05c578fa: Why, yes I am. Why do you ask?
textByHash.507b66f83dfe2f7c4d78ed807681000da0266cd4: Well obviously it's the seasons. They all seem to be out-of-wack these days. Summer comes earlier and earlier each year, but then it simply rushes by!
textByHash.441ac192dda0f0a89c32876ea012641e45e834b9: If you find out what is upsetting the seasons you'll find out what is causing the harvest to fail.
textByHash.7ff937aa7ee5b30960a347c0bb10172b90dd9f36: No, sorry, but find that out and you'll get to the root of our problems.
